---
title: "Project 6 - Text Analysis"
---

![https://www.usatoday.com/gcdn/authoring/authoring-images/2024/03/08/USAT/72890876007-xxx-news-state-of-the-union-2024062.JPG]

This project analyzes State of the Union Addresses from 1970 to 2021.

## Analyses

This website presents two text analyses:

- [Analysis 1: Title of Your First Text Analysis](analysis1.html)
- [Analysis 2: Title of Your Second Text Analysis](analysis2.html)
